title: lagerstroemia suprareticulata
intro: Lagerstroemia suprareticulata, also known as the 'Purple Fountain' or 'Red Flowering Crape Myrtle', is a species of flowering plant in the family Lythraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Lagerstroemia suprareticulata include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of diarrhea and dysentery. Lagerstroemia suprareticulata can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
